artifacts.verificationNotes: Official newschool.edu page found by Firecrawl search and scraped successfully by Firecrawl; direct HTTP returned 200 and robots.txt did not disallow /tools-training/mc-ai-guidelines/.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Generative AI at The New School
artifacts.queryUsed: Linked from The New School M&C AI guidelines page as university knowledge base guidance.
artifacts.verificationNotes: Not used as claim evidence in this run because the URL is hosted on app.getguru.com rather than an official New School domain or subdomain.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: The official New School page links to this Guru card, but the page itself is hosted on app.getguru.com rather than a New School controlled domain.
artifacts.notes: Excluded from claim evidence under the official university source rule for this isolated staged run.

methodsAttempted.query: site:newschool.edu generative AI policy academic integrity teaching learning artificial intelligence "The New School"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned no web results for the first narrow query.
Firecrawl returned a research/news page and an official privacy/security PDF; neither was used as primary claim evidence for policy-specific AI guidance.
Firecrawl surfaced the official Marketing & Communications AI Guidelines page as the strongest policy-specific official source.
The official page linked to a Guru knowledge-base card; it was rejected as evidence because it is not on an official New School domain.

artifacts.summary: Discovery used Firecrawl search first, then direct official-page fetch checks. One official New School AI guidance page was verified for narrow M&C-scope claims; the external Guru link was not used as claim evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: Marketing & Communications AI Guidelines | Tools and Training | The New School

stopConditions: Stop after verified official New School AI guidance page is captured and claims remain scoped to Marketing & Communications.
Do not use the external Guru page as evidence unless a later run verifies an official New School controlled source.

artifacts.claimText: For Marketing & Communications professional work at The New School, people must evaluate, fact-check, edit, and document AI-generated content before using it.

artifacts.title: The New School AI Guidance Staged Evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence from The New School's official Marketing & Communications AI Guidelines supports four narrow agent-reviewed candidate claims about M&C AI output review, meeting-consent privacy, sensitive-data upload as unapproved usage, and adherence to university standards and policies.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

Claims are scoped to The New School Marketing & Communications AI guidance and should not be generalized to student academic-integrity rules or all university teaching policy without additional official evidence.
